shortDescription: Well-maintained 4-bedroom semi in Leslieville with updated kitchen and south-facing garden.
fullDescription: Welcome to 175 Jones Avenue in the vibrant Leslieville neighbourhood. This charming semi-detached home seamlessly blends period character with modern comfort. The main living area showcases original architectural details alongside tasteful modern updates. The kitchen offers ample counter space, premium fixtures, and a convenient eat-in dining area. All 4 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. The deep lot provides ample space for gardening, play, or future expansion. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Chef’s kitchen with granite countertops and premium appliances
